untranslatable_reason: BARR Bottom pattern requires detection of multi-point trend line structure (peak A, peak B, lead-in height, bump height with 2:1 ratio) which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicators and basic operators. Pattern recognition requires geometric analysis of price structure across multiple bars and ratio comparisons between non-contiguous price points that exceed the capabilities of the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal describes a complex chart pattern with specific geometric properties: (1) identification of two peaks (A and B) to draw a trend line, (2) measurement of lead-in height vs bump height with 2:1 ratio requirement, (3) confirmation on breakout above trend line. These multi-bar structural comparisons and ratio validations cannot be reliably encoded using only the ALLOWED_INDICATORS (which are primarily single-value indicators at current bar) and ALLOWED_OPERATORS (which lack array/historical indexing beyond prev_* variables). A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic or access to trend line drawing and geometric comparison functions not available in this framework.
